fallbackSurfaces.proof: ESPN fallback visible when MLB Stats API unavailable

visibleSurfaces.proof: [BSD MOMENTUM] block appears in WC journalism context when game is live
Win probability chip A739 visible on WC game cards

fallbackSurfaces.proof: Brief renders without [BSD MOMENTUM] when bsdEventId absent

knownGaps: SVG pitch div not yet in WC card DOM (CC-CMD-G June 25 incomplete)
bsdEventId only populated during BSD live window — captured to D1 at game-final
momentum route was 404 until 2026-06-29 cd68c60 fix

kali-afl.note: Kali is not a standalone normalizer. Data is injected into game.journalism.kali by buildAFLJournalismContext() in handleV2Games.

visibleSurfaces.proof: game.journalism.kali.factors[] with named labels and impact scores appear in AFL briefs
game.journalism.kali.homeWinPct / awayWinPct available for AFL card WP display

fallbackSurfaces.proof: AFL brief renders without Kali data when KALI_AFL_TOKEN absent or API error

knownGaps: No client-side normalizer — data is relay-injected
No dedicated CONTEXT_SOURCE in context-assembler.js — inline in handleV2Games

odds-api.sport: Multi-sport (MLB, WNBA, WC26, NBA, NHL, EPL, CFL, AFL)

oddsStory.output: [ODDS STORY] ML moved X pts direction. Total moved X.X.
oddsStory.requires: both opening_odds AND closing_odds non-null in D1

wcPregame.description: Direct odds fetch for WC win probability lambdas

requiredFields.note: spread absent from FanDuel rows — always null-guard

visibleSurfaces.proof: [ODDS STORY] block in journalism context when opening + closing odds exist
MLB and WC26 odds return from /odds/v4/sports/{key}/odds
WC game cards carry win probability derived from soccer_fifa_world_cup odds

knownGaps: computeOddsStory requires BOTH opening_odds AND closing_odds — fires only for completed games
MLB today has no opening_odds in D1 yet (cron runs at game start)
WP source='default-lambda' on MLB objects — odds feed D1 not live WP

liveFeed.field: wp (win probability), tagged with a _savantWP provenance marker ({wp, wpa, ts, source:'savant'}) on espnScores[key] alongside the existing _liveOddsWP marker set by the odds-api wp_update SSE path — both write the same .wp field, so the provenance marker is what distinguishes a Savant-sourced value from an odds-derived one (fixed 2026-07-01, previously undistinguishable)

baseball-savant.normalizer: N/A — direct CSV/JSON consumption, no shared normalizer function
requiredNormalizedFields: TEAM_ABS_RANKINGS entries: grade, battingWon, battingAttempted, battingRate
PITCHER_ARSENAL entries: team, pitches[] (type, usage, whiffRate, runValuePer100)
presentationConsumers: getPitchArsenal / getMLBAnalyticsContext (index.html) — client-side journalism prompt context

visibleSurfaces.selector: N/A (assembled client-side, not DOM) — proof is a getMLBAnalyticsContext line containing '<pitcher>: <type> +/-X RV/100 (Y% K)'
visibleSurfaces.proof: getMLBAnalyticsContext output includes a pitcher-arsenal line, not just ABS challenge grade
win probability percentage visible, sourced from Savant gf feed specifically (tagged via _savantWP)

fallbackSurfaces.proof: getMLBAnalyticsContext gracefully omits the pitcher-arsenal line when PITCHER_ARSENAL has no entry for that pitcher — ABS grade line still renders alone (this already worked; the actual bug being fixed was pitch_arsenals.json producing zero data, not a fallback gap)

knownGaps: pitch-arsenal-stats has no velocity column — runValuePer100 replaces velocity as the pitch-quality metric shown to users
whiffRate is null when whiff_percent is missing from a given CSV row — consumer (getPitchArsenal) renders 'n/a whiff' rather than fabricating a value

visibleSurfaces.proof: MLS game card renders with score (e.g., STL 3-0 ATX)
[SOCCER XG CONTEXT] block with Possession: appears in MLS game journalism

fallbackSurfaces.proof: No explicit ESPN fallback — V2 source is primary

knownGaps: MLS has no xG data — _hasXG is false, but _hasMatchStats is true (possession, shots)
Tournament postseason multiplexer uses /context/date/{date} route, not a dedicated MLS endpoint
Proof-mode fixture uses past date 2026-05-23; live MLS season resumes post-WC-break 2026-07-16
